log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vedalken — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vedalken — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vedalken — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Vedalken — Armored Escapist HP: 46/59
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Vedalken — Armored Escapist HP: 32/59
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Vedalken — Armored Escapist --- HP: 32/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vedalken — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vedalken — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 31 damage. Vedalken — Armored Escapist HP: 1/59
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Vedalken — Armored Escapist HP: -16/59
══ ROUND 1 ══

--- Vedalken — Armored Escapist --- HP: 46/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

══ ROUND 2 ══

** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Vedalken — Armored Escapist --- HP: 46/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
